long_description:
Schematics -> F5 -> error is 403
There was a rule that was previously working, now its rejecting requests
IP address referenced in AT (CNR - deny) related to a specific action in schematics
Normally the IP is allowed because the IP comes from the VPC (CSE source address) - going through private endpoint.
The goal was to have all the calls coming from the CSE endpoints
All of the calls since the change (after 12am 3rd Dec) are now coming from other endpoints
Incident source: #cs4422888-bnpp-can-not-manage-schematics-workspace - Sean Caffrey (IaaS CORE)


Customer is expecting these CSE IP's
10.223.113.223
BNPP_EU 1
10.223.116.112
BNPP_EU 1
10.223.111.142
BNPP_EU 1
10.223.125.184
BNPP_EU 2
10.223.121.211
BNPP_EU 2
10.223.128.138
BNPP_EU 2
10.223.143.134
BNPP_EU 3
10.223.136.244
BNPP_EU 3
10.223.141.49
short_description: Schematics calls should be coming from CSE IPs but are being blocked by CBR
close_notes:
(All Timestamps must be in UTC) 
Issue Summary:Schematics provisioning issues
 
At 2025-12-02 23:20 UTC   IBM Cloud engineers have been alerted by customer via case cs4422888 that Schematics provisioning and Orchestration are impacted  . IBM Cloud engineers are currently investigating the issue > and will continue to provide updates until the issue is resolved
 
SME Findings: sme-team: SME Findings
Reason of Escalation:
Resolution Steps:
Signature of Issue:
"message": "Unauthorized access. Check that you have the correct access credentials and permissions.",
"statuscode": 403

Jira/Github/Other Tickets:
Category/Subcategory:
Timeline Summary:
(All Timestamps must be in UTC)
2025-12-04
12:05 - Call started with BNPP 
12:09 - ACS Network Team has joined the call .BNPP was suspecting the CSTASK0055399 to add additional CSE IP's might have caused the issue  and asked to revert the change
12:34 - Overlay SDN SRE team has joined the call and confirmed that the IP's they have added are much later than the issue customer has reported and they are still in an inactive state. So this has been ruled out.
12:38 - CORE team has checked for the manual CR's executed last 24 hours and ruled out they weren't the issues 
13:00 - CBR team joined and analyzed the logs from their end and could not find any issues . CBR just process the inputs from Schematics where IP address is an input. CBR team suggested looking at the Schematic logs 
13:57 - Schematic Team also analyzed the logs and shared the payload for CBR evaluation and found nothing unusual.
14:08 - BNPP requested the severity to be raised to SEV1
14:18 - CORE team has opened an incident and warroom 
14:30 - Further troubleshooting going on with SDN , CBR , Schematics ,on the call 
16:02 - IKS joined the call and started troubleshooting from a CSE perspective
16:09 - IKS CSE team started troubleshooting , running tcpdumps 
16:45 - IKS CSE team identified a potential automated CR CHG14159618 could be the cause 
16:52 - IKS CSE team started reverting the CR CHG14159618 
17:00 - The changes were reverted 
17:06 - BNPP confirmed that Schematis have started working . 
Resolution Runbook: Not Needed / Not Available / URL
Caused by Change/Incident:
 
Warroom:  #warroom-vpc-inc10475850
Meeting URL: Join the meeting now
 
Outage Start: 2025-12-02 23:20:00
Outage End:  2025-12-04 17:00:00
Detection Time: 2025-12-04 11:30:00
Identification Time : 2025-12-04 16:48:00
Mitigation Time: 2025-12-04 17:00:00
CIE pilot/co-pilot/squad names: Charles / Sudeep
CORE Manager names: John
Executives(VPs) names:
Team mitigated the CIE:
Next Update Time:
